name: OpenAI GPT-5.5 output price
frequency: Monthly check or whenever pricing changes
bullishThreshold: Cost down while usage up = app margin positive
riskThreshold: Cost remains high and apps cannot pass through pricing
interpretation: Frontier reasoning remains expensive; benefits infrastructure and model providers, pressures thin-margin AI apps.

name: OpenAI GPT-5.5 cached input price
bullishThreshold: Cached input is <=10% of base input
riskThreshold: Workloads cannot cache or reuse long context
interpretation: Caching is a key margin lever for long-context and agent workflows.

name: Claude Opus 4.7 output price
bullishThreshold: Premium output price remains high with strong demand
riskThreshold: Deep price cuts without offsetting volume
interpretation: High-end model usage still creates real COGS for AI apps; routing matters.

name: Gemini lowest listed output price
bullishThreshold: Low-cost tier expands AI app use cases
interpretation: Low-cost inference is increasingly commoditized; good for application adoption, bad for undifferentiated API resale.

name: DeepSeek cache-hit input price
riskThreshold: Price anchor forces industry-wide margin compression
interpretation: DeepSeek is a low-price anchor for commodity inference, particularly relevant for China AI price competition.

name: NVIDIA Q1 FY2027 total revenue
riskThreshold: Growth slows or hyperscaler order visibility weakens
interpretation: AI accelerator demand remains the strongest near-term proof point for token-economy infrastructure.

name: NVIDIA Q1 FY2027 data center revenue
bullishThreshold: Data center revenue grows faster than total revenue
interpretation: Data center revenue is the closest listed-equity proxy for AI token compute demand.

name: Broadcom Q1 FY2026 AI revenue
bullishThreshold: AI revenue grows >75% YoY and guide increases
riskThreshold: Custom accelerator orders weaken or customers insource
interpretation: Custom AI accelerators and networking remain a second core route beyond GPUs.

name: Microsoft Q2 FY2026 capex
bullishThreshold: Capex raised and demand exceeds supply
riskThreshold: Capex cuts or depreciation pressure hurts margins
interpretation: Hyperscaler capex is the best quarterly signal for sustained AI infrastructure demand.

name: Global data-center electricity consumption
bullishThreshold: Data-center power grows faster than global electricity demand
riskThreshold: Grid constraints delay AI capacity additions
interpretation: Power availability is becoming a constraint and profit pool for AI infrastructure.
